backstory.original: Lucius Virion-Elluin Elenasto was born to high nobility. He thought he knew what he was getting into when he joined the Heroes of Aerois, but then he met his first cow. Dreadful, evil creatures. Lucius is slowly coming out of his nobility shell as he continues to learn the true value of comradery, friendship, and a world without barriers.
backstory.display: 卢修斯·维里安艾露恩·埃莱那斯托出生于高级贵族家庭。当他加入埃罗伊斯的英雄们时，他以为知道自己要做什么，但后来他遇到了他的第一个困难：可怕而邪恶的生物们。卢修斯正慢慢走出他的贵族外壳，开始不断地了解战友、友谊，以及一个没有障碍的世界的真正价值。

description.original: Lucius attacks a random enemy with Acid Splash, dealing damage. Prefers enemies not affected by acid.
description.display: 卢修斯用酸液飞溅攻击随机敌人，造成伤害。首选没有受到酸液影响的敌人。

description.original: Lucius attacks with a cone of prismatic energy dealing damage and applying both Arcane Chromat debuffs.
description.display: 卢修斯用一股锥形虹光能量发动攻击，造成伤害并施加两种奥术色彩减益。

longDescription.original: Eight multicoloured rays flash from Lucius' hand in a cone shape. Each enemy in the cone takes damage and receives both Arcane Chromat debuffs.
longDescription.display: 卢修斯的手中射出一股锥形的八色射线。锥形范围内的所有敌人都会受到伤害，并被施加奥术色彩：强酸和奥术色彩：寒冰。

description.original: Enemies hit by Lucius' acid attack (orange) take damage over time.
description.display: 被卢修斯的强酸攻击（橙色）命中的敌人会受到持续伤害。

description.original: Enemies affected by both of Lucius' debuffs are stunned briefly and then explode, taking massive damage and spreading Arcane Chromat - Acid to all nearby enemies.
description.display: 如果敌人同时受到卢修斯的两种减益效果影响，则会在短暂眩晕后爆炸，受到高额伤害并使奥术色彩：强酸扩散到附近所有敌人身上。

conditions.desc: Lucius attacks twice with his Acid Splash before switching to Ray of Frost.
Lucius attacks twice with his Ray of Frost before switching to Acid Splash.
Lucius alternates his attacks between two spells: Acid Splash and Ray of Frost.
卢修斯用他的酸液飞溅攻击两次，然后切换成冰冻射线。
卢修斯用他的冰冻射线攻击两次，然后切换成酸液飞溅。
卢修斯用两种法术交替攻击：酸液飞溅和冰冻射线。

description.desc: Enemies damaged by Acid Splash gain one stack of Acid. Each stack of Acid causes the enemy to take $amount% more damage from all of Lucius' subsequent attacks, stacking multiplicatively up to $acid_max_stacks___2 times.
受到“酸液飞溅”伤害的敌人获得一层“强酸”。每层“酸液”堆叠会使敌人受到卢修斯后续攻击的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $acid_max_stacks___2 次。

tipText.original: Lucius deals extra damage to enemies the more times he attacks them with Acid Splash.
tipText.display: 卢修斯用“酸液飞溅”攻击敌人的次数越多，对这些敌人造成的额外伤害就越高。

description.desc: Enemies damaged by Ray of Frost are slowed by $cold_slow_amount___2% for $debuff_duration___2 seconds. Enemies slowed by this ability take $amount% more damage from all of Lucius' attacks for each slow, stun, or root affecting them (stacking multiplicatively), including this slow.
受到冰冻射线伤害的敌人减速 $cold_slow_amount___2%，持续 $debuff_duration___2 秒。被此技能减速的敌人每受到一项减速、眩晕或定身效果（包括此减速效果）影响，其受到卢修斯所有攻击的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Lucius deals extra damage to slowed, stunned, and rooted enemies.
tipText.display: 对受到减速、眩晕或定身效果的敌人，卢修斯可造成额外伤害。

conditions.desc: When an enemy is affected by both of Lucius' Arcane Chromat abilities at the same time they are stunned for $lucius_elemental_adept_timer seconds. When the stun expires they "explode" with acid and ice, applying two stacks of Acid and dealing $amount seconds of BUD-based damage to themselves and all enemies in a small radius. The exploding enemy's Arcane Chromat - Cold debuff is then consumed.

When an enemy is affected by both of Lucius' Arcane Chromat abilities at the same time they are stunned for $lucius_elemental_adept_timer seconds. When the stun expires they "explode" with acid and ice, applying one stack of Acid and dealing $amount seconds of BUD-based damage to themselves and all enemies in a small radius. The exploding enemy's Arcane Chromat - Cold debuff is then consumed.
当一名敌人同时受到卢修斯的两种“奥术色彩”技能影响时，该敌人将被眩晕 $lucius_elemental_adept_timer 秒。当眩晕结束时，该敌人会“爆炸”并喷射出酸液和寒冰，对其自身和小范围内的所有敌人施加两层“强酸”堆叠，并造成等同于 $amount 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。随后，发生爆炸的敌人身上的“奥术色彩：寒冰”减益会被消耗。
当一名敌人同时受到卢修斯的两种“奥术色彩”技能影响时，该敌人将被眩晕 $lucius_elemental_adept_timer 秒。当眩晕结束时，该敌人会“爆炸”并喷射出酸液和寒冰，对其自身和小范围内的所有敌人施加一层“强酸”堆叠，并造成等同于 $amount 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。随后，发生爆炸的敌人身上的“奥术色彩：寒冰”减益会被消耗。

description.desc: Lucius gains a Dichromancy stack every time the Elemental Adept ability triggers an explosion. Lucius' damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Dichromancy stack he has, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks times. Stacks reset when changing areas.
“元素精通”技能每触发一次爆炸，卢修斯获得一层“二元色彩”堆叠。卢修斯每拥有一层“二元色彩”堆叠，他的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks 次。改变区域时重置堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Lucius's damage increases in an area the more he can trigger an explosion by combining his favorite two elements.
specializationDescription.display: 卢修斯通过组合他最喜欢的两种元素触发爆炸的次数越多，他在一个区域中的伤害就越高。

description.desc: Lucius attacks twice with his Acid Splash before switching to Ray of Frost. Additionally, enemies affected by at least $stack_threshold stacks of Acid take $amount% more damage from all of Lucius' attacks.
卢修斯用他的酸液飞溅攻击两次，然后切换成冰冻射线。此外，受到至少 $stack_threshold 层“强酸”影响的敌人，受到卢修斯所有攻击的伤害提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Lucius attacks more often with his Acid Splash and it leaves his foes even more vulnerable to additional damage.
specializationDescription.display: 卢修斯更频繁地使用“酸液飞溅”进行攻击，并使他的敌人更容易受到额外伤害。

description.desc: Lucius attacks twice with his Ray of Frost before switching to Acid Splash. When an enemy explodes and loses their Arcane Chromat - Cold debuff, they gain a Lingering Chill debuff which slows them by $amount___2% and lasts for $debuff_duration___2 seconds. Additionally, enemies affected by at least $stack_threshold slow effects take $amount% more damage from all of Lucius' attacks.
卢修斯用他的冰冻射线攻击两次，然后切换成酸液飞溅。当一名敌人爆炸并失去“奥术色彩：寒冰”减益效果时，将获得“萦绕寒冷”减益效果，使其减速 $amount___2%，持续 $debuff_duration___2 秒。此外，受到至少 $stack_threshold 项减速效果影响的敌人，受到卢修斯所有攻击的伤害提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Lucius attacks more frequently with his Ray of Frost and enemies remain minorly slowed even after he has triggered his combo, as well as taking more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 卢修斯更频繁地使用“冰冻射线”进行攻击，并且即使在他触发连招后，敌人仍会保持轻微减速状态，并会受到更多伤害。

description.desc: Lucius contributes $base_stacks___2 stacks to Aerois Synergy every time Elemental Adept is triggered; if a boss enemy is combo'd it adds an additional $bonus_boss_stacks___2 stacks (10 total). Lucius' maximum number of stacks is $base_max_stacks___2 plus the highest area completed in the current run divided by 5 (rounded down). $percent_of_stacks_to_remove_on_area_change___2% of his contributed stacks are removed when changing areas. Lucius' base damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% times the total number of Aerois Synergy stacks, with this bonus doubling for every 100 total stacks.

每触发一次“元素精通”，卢修斯会为“埃罗伊斯协同”贡献 $base_stacks___2 层堆叠；如果连击的目标是首领，则额外增加 $bonus_boss_stacks___2 层（总共 10 层）。卢修斯的最大堆叠层数为 $base_max_stacks___2 加上当前冒险中完成的最高区域除以 5（向下取整）。切换区域时，他所贡献堆叠层数的 $percent_of_stacks_to_remove_on_area_change___2% 会被移除。卢修斯的基础伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)% 乘以“埃罗伊斯协同”的总堆叠层数，总堆叠层数每满 100，此加成翻倍。

effect_keys.stack_title: 埃罗伊斯协同堆叠层数

conditions.desc: Enemies with segmented health lose 2 extra segments when Lucius damages them with his Acid Splash attack or Elemental Adept explosion.
Enemies with segmented health lose 1 extra segment when Lucius damages them with his Acid Splash attack or Elemental Adept explosion.
当卢修斯用他的“酸液飞溅”攻击或“元素精通”爆炸对有分段式生命值的敌人造成伤害时，他们额外损失 2 段生命值。
当卢修斯用他的“酸液飞溅”攻击或“元素精通”爆炸对有分段式生命值的敌人造成伤害时，他们额外损失 1 段生命值。

description.original: Yes. Well. Daddy paid for many classes.
description.display: 是的，好吧，爸爸带我学过很多课。

description.original: I've been known to throw down!
description.display: 噢，过去我一直因为挑战而出名！

description.original: Here's a little variation I learned from one of my tutors.
description.display: 这是我从一位导师那里学到的一个小变化。

description.original: I believe that might leave a mark.
description.display: 我觉得这可能会留下印记。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Lucius' Arcane Chromat - Acid ability by $amount%

description.original: Do you need to cool that off?
description.display: 需要把它冷却下吗？

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Lucius' Arcane Chromat - Acid ability by $amount%

description.original: I can't be seen looking like this! Like you! I'm hideous!
description.display: 我不能被人看见我这副样子！像你一样！我难看死了！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Lucius' Arcane Chromat - Acid ability by $amount%

description.original: Can't we just all relax and talk this over?
description.display: 我们就不能放松下来，好好谈谈吗？

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Lucius' Arcane Chromat - Cold ability by $amount%

description.original: Anyone feeling a chill? I think it's getting cold!
description.display: 有人觉得冷吗？我感觉越来越冷了！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Lucius' Arcane Chromat - Cold ability by $amount%

description.original: Just STAY there!
description.display: 呆在那里别动！

effects.description: Increases the stun duration of Lucius' Elemental Adept ability by 2 seconds

description.original: Oh, dear! That was quite a strong reaction. Let's try that again.
description.display: 噢，天哪！好强烈的反应啊。我们再试一遍。

description.original: Not to worry, that will simply wash off. What? It's not? Oh, dear.
description.display: 别担心，那很容易洗掉的。什么？洗不掉？噢，天哪。

effects.description: Increases the amount of Acid stacks applied by Elemental Adept by 1

description.original: I can draw magic from color itself.
description.display: 我可以从色彩本身中汲取魔力。

description.original: Can we just solve this with coin?
description.display: 我们能用硬币解决这个问题吗？

description.original: I do have a tendency to get under people's skin.
description.display: 我确实很容易惹怒别人。

effects.description: Increases the amount of health segments broken by Armor Eating Acid by 1

description.original: Do you see? My magic is quite colorful.
description.display: 看到没？我的魔法可是五彩缤纷的。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lucius' Specializations by $amount%

description.original: I'm simply keeping my options open, that's all.
description.display: 我只是想给自己多留些选择，仅此而已。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lucius' Specializations by $amount%

description.original: I've had a breakthrough! Now, behold, my power!
description.display: 我取得突破了！来见识一下我的力量吧！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lucius' Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Please, please, please, just slow down.
description.display: 求求你，求求你，求求你，慢点。

effects.description: Increases the slow effect of Lucius' Lingering Chill ability by $amount%

description.original: I would prefer it if you were to just STOP.
description.display: 我更希望你就此打住。

effects.description: Increases the slow duration of Lucius' Lingering Chill ability by 100%

description.original: Right, then. Let's just soldier on, shall we?
description.display: 那好吧，我们继续坚持吧，如何？

description.original: I do think my tutors covered this.
description.display: 我的导师应该交过这个。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Lucius Virion-Elluin Elenasto was born to high nobility. He thought he knew what he was getting into when he joined the Heroes of Aerois, but then he met his first cow. Dreadful, evil creatures. Lucius is slowly coming out of his nobility shell as he continues to learn the true value of comradery, friendship, and a world without barriers.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Lucius alternates between Acid and Frost attacks, causing enemies afflicted by both to explode in with poisonous goo.

event_upgrades.name: Arcane Chromat - Acid
event_upgrades.description: Enemies hit by Lucius' acid attack (orange) take damage over time.

event_upgrades.name: Elemental Adept
event_upgrades.description: Enemies affected by both of Lucius' debuffs are stunned briefly and then explode, taking massive damage and spreading Arcane Chromat - Acid to all nearby enemies.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 卢修斯·维里安艾露恩·埃莱那斯托出生于高级贵族家庭。当他加入埃罗伊斯的英雄们时，他以为知道自己要做什么，但后来他遇到了他的第一个困难：可怕而邪恶的生物们。卢修斯正慢慢走出他的贵族外壳，开始不断地了解战友、友谊，以及一个没有障碍的世界的真正价值。

original.description: I do have a tendency to get under people's skin.
